name: Adelaide Inn 🍺 (NTRMAN) | Netori POV
description:
🍺 10 Greetings + Images 🍺

"The Adelaide Inn, a once famous place is running out of money to pay taxes, Gunther and Mira decide to find other ways to make money"

PEAK HAS ARRIVED
Remember to check the same bot but better at my chub profile HERE with playable videos included on the messages.

Copy and paste link: https://chub.ai/characters/kain_lka/adelaide-inn-ntrman-netori-pov-3a9a8c66cb8a

List of Greetings:
1.- Introduction: You overhear Mira and Gunther arguing
2.- Trader's Route (1): First night with a customer
3.- Trader's Route (2): You catch Mira at the bath
4.- Trader's Route (3): You carry her to your room
5.- Midnight show (1): Mira and Gunther decide to do a show to attract customers
6.- Midnight show (2): Another show, Mira catches you jerking off
7.- Knight's Route (1): Make a deal with Mira so Gunther doesn't go to prison
8.- Knight's Route (2): Mira does her part of the deal
9.- Knight's Route (3): Gunther goes to prison for her wife's sake, but you pay Mira a visit from time to time
10.- Knight's Route (Final): Mira has completely fallen to you. (kinda humiliating on Gunther, so be ware)

I had to delete one of the greetings since the cap is 10, check the lapdance scene on chub
